output.text:
To compute $\dbinom{31}{28}$, we use the formula for combinations:
\[
\dbinom{n}{k} = \frac{n!}{k!(n-k)!}
\]
where $n=31$ and $k=28$. Plugging in these values, we get:
\begin{align*}
\dbinom{31}{28} &= \frac{31!}{28!(31-28)!} \\
&= \frac{31!}{28! \cdot 3!} \\
&= \frac{31 \times 30 \times 29 \times 28!}{28! \times 3!} \\
&= \frac{31 \times 30 \times 29}{3!} \\
&= \frac{31 \times 30 \times 29}{6} \\
&= \frac{31 \times 30 \times 29}{2 \times 3} \\
&= \frac{31 \times 10 \times 29}{2} \\
&= 31 \times 10 \times \frac{29}{2} \\
&= 31 \times 5 \times 29 \\
&= 155 \times 29 \\
&= 4505
\end{align*}
So, the value of $\dbinom{31}{28}$ is $\boxed{4505}$. ки
